questions.question: At the Global Production Awards held on 20 May 2025 during the Cannes Film Festival, which city was honoured with the Best City of Film Award?

In January 2025, how many sportspeople were awarded with the Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award for the year 2024?
Which film won the Best Picture award at the 25ᵗʰ IIFA Awards in 2025?
Who among the following was the first Indian cricketer to receive the Padma Bhushan award?
Which biochemist received the Nobel Prize in 1958 for his work on the structure of proteins, especially insulin?
